title: PRIVATE NURSE MANAGER
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a dedicated and experienced Private Nurse Manager to oversee and coordinate home-based nursing services for our clients. This role involves managing a team of nurses/caregivers, conducting client assessments, ensuring high standards of care delivery, and serving as the key liaison between clients, families, and medical professionals.

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct initial assessments for new clients (elderly / post-hospital / special needs) to understand care requirements.
  • Develop and oversee personalised care plans and monitor ongoing progress.
  • Manage and assign private nurses/caregivers, ensuring appropriate matching of skills and cases.
  • Perform regular home visits to evaluate care quality and client satisfaction.
  • Coordinate with hospitals, doctors, physiotherapists, therapists, and family members for seamless continuity of care.
  • Train and supervise nursing staff on clinical procedures, documentation, and infection control.
  • Handle incident reports, medication administration, and emergency protocols.
  • Maintain case records, progress notes, and compliance documentation according to MOH / licensing requirements.
  • Support in service improvement, SOP development, and auditing processes.

Requirements

  • Registered Nurse (RN) with valid SNB (Singapore Nursing Board) licence.
  • Minimum 3–5 years of nursing experience, preferably in home care / community nursing / ward / ICU / geriatric care.
  • Experience in supervising or managing teams is a strong advantage.
  • Strong communication skills, able to interact with families, doctors, and caregivers professionally.
  • Compassionate, adaptable, and meticulous in care coordination and documentation.

Benefits

  • Competitive salary package: $4000 - $6000 (based on experience)
  • Flexible scheduling with autonomy in managing cases
  • Opportunity to lead and shape a growing private nursing division
  • Supportive & purpose-driven working environment

How to Apply

Please send your resume to admin@chnssg.com with the subject “Application – Private Nurse Manager”.

postedCompany.description:
CareHome Nursing Pte Ltd 

CareHome was founded 2019 base in Singapore. We aim to provide complete and efficient one-stop home health care for the clients. The Company is to provide best Home Health Care with available community medical resources. Our vision is to provide best satisfying home health care for all our clients. We treat our clients with our knowledge and attitude. We believe in not only treating numbers, but also individual well-beings. At end of the day, brightening our patient’s living at home, also give the family member peace of mind.   We do provide Manpower supply services to multiple healthcare orgnizations too from 2020.
postedCompany.name: CAREHOME NURSING PTE. LTD.
